documentation.text:
@dev Roles a wallet address can hold in the system.
      Unregistered wallets have role = None.
@dev Lifecycle of a registration request.
@dev Primary registry: wallet → Entity
@dev All addresses that have ever submitted a registration request
@dev Addresses currently awaiting admin decision
@dev Quick set-membership for pendingList (avoid O(n) scan on removal)
@dev License number uniqueness guard: licenseNo → assigned address

documentation.text:
@notice Re-approve a previously rejected or revoked entity
         (e.g. after appeal), keeping the same license number.

@notice Admin can correct or update an entity's profile fields.
         Does NOT change role or approval status.

@notice Approved entities can update their own email and location.
         Name and role changes require admin action.

@notice Primary guard used by other contracts.
         Returns true only if the address is Approved AND holds the expected role.
@notice Returns true if the address is approved for ANY valid role.
@notice Returns the role of an address regardless of approval status.
@notice Returns the approval status of an address.
@notice Returns full entity record for an address.
@notice Lookup an entity by license number.
@notice Returns all pending registration requests (for the admin dashboard).

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) pure returns (struct RegistryContract.Entity memory[] memory)

documentation.text:
@notice Returns the full list of pending requests with their Entity details.
         Useful for the admin panel to render a table in one call.
@notice Returns all registered addresses (approved + pending + rejected + revoked).

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) pure returns (struct RegistryContract.Entity memory[] memory)

documentation.text:
@notice Returns all entities of a specific role that are Approved.
         Used by Manufacturer to list available Distributors, etc.

@notice Returns the license number assigned to an address.
         Returns empty string if not yet assigned.

@notice Returns the wallet address registered under a given license number.
         Returns address(0) if not found.

@dev Removes an address from the pendingList array and
      clears its isPending flag. Uses swap-and-pop for O(n) removal.

devdoc.details: Deploy this contract first; pass its address to the         constructor of ProductContract, TransferContract and         TraceContract.

params._admin: The wallet address that will act as system admin.               Typically the deployer's address.

params._role: One of: Manufacturer(2), Distributor(3),                   Supplier(4), Pharmacist(5). Cannot self-register as Admin.

allRegistered.details: All addresses that have ever submitted a registration request

isPending.details: Quick set-membership for pendingList (avoid O(n) scan on removal)

licenseToAddress.details: License number uniqueness guard: licenseNo → assigned address

devdoc.title: RegistryContract

approveEntity(address,string).notice: Approve a pending registration and assign a license number.

getAddressByLicense(string).notice: Returns the wallet address registered under a given license number.         Returns address(0) if not found.

getAllRegistered().notice: Returns all registered addresses (approved + pending + rejected + revoked).

getApprovedByRole(uint8).notice: Returns all entities of a specific role that are Approved.         Used by Manufacturer to list available Distributors, etc.

getEntity(address).notice: Returns full entity record for an address.

getEntityByLicense(string).notice: Lookup an entity by license number.

getLicenseNumber(address).notice: Returns the license number assigned to an address.         Returns empty string if not yet assigned.

getPendingEntities().notice: Returns the full list of pending requests with their Entity details.         Useful for the admin panel to render a table in one call.

getPendingRequests().notice: Returns all pending registration requests (for the admin dashboard).

getRole(address).notice: Returns the role of an address regardless of approval status.

getStatus(address).notice: Returns the approval status of an address.

isApproved(address).notice: Returns true if the address is approved for ANY valid role.

isApprovedWithRole(address,uint8).notice: Primary guard used by other contracts.         Returns true only if the address is Approved AND holds the expected role.

reactivateEntity(address).notice: Re-approve a previously rejected or revoked entity         (e.g. after appeal), keeping the same license number.

requestRegistration(uint8,string,string,.notice: Submit a signup request. Admin must approve before the         entity can interact with other contracts.

revokeEntity(address).notice: Revoke an already-approved entity (e.g. license violation).         The entity's on-chain record is preserved for audit purposes         but isApproved() will return false.

transferAdmin(address).notice: Transfer admin rights to a new wallet.         The new admin must already be an approved entity OR         be a fresh address (role becomes Admin).

updateEntityDetails(address,string,strin.notice: Admin can correct or update an entity's profile fields.         Does NOT change role or approval status.

updateMyDetails(string,string).notice: Approved entities can update their own email and location.         Name and role changes require admin action.

userdoc.notice: Central identity & access-control registry for the         Blockchain-Based Medicine Supply Chain system.         All other contracts query this contract to verify         that a caller is approved and holds the correct role.
